name: Herbed Tofu in White Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 small wedge of onion, left in one piece (about 4cm x 2cm)
1/2 lb (or so) herbed tofu, cubed into about 1.5 cm cubes
your favorite pasta, enough for two servings
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a pan and whisk in flour.
2. Allow to cool slightly, then whisk in wine and soy milk.
3. Add onion, ground cloves, and salt to the sauce and stir over low heat until the sauce is slightly thickened. If it becomes too thick, add some water.
4. Add tofu and simmer while cooking the pasta.
5. Serve tofu and sauce over pasta, giving the onions to the person who likes them more.
